title: Rajbari National Park
tagline: Rajbari National Park — wildlife reserve of Tripura

overview.short: Rajbari (Bison) National Park is a national park in the Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary, in Tripura, India.
overview.description: Rajbari (Bison) National Park is a national park in the Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary, in Tripura, India. It covers an area of about 31.63 square kilometres (12.21 sq mi).

topPlaces.name: Belonia, India
topPlaces.description: Belonia is a town and municipal council in South Tripura district, Tripura, India. It is also the headquarters of South Tripura District.

topPlaces.name: Rangamura
topPlaces.description: Rangamura is a village situated on the hills of Boromura range in Tripura, India. The populace consists of tribes like Kuki, Hrangkhawl, Koloi, Tripuri, Kaipeng and others.

topPlaces.name: Parshuram Upazila
topPlaces.description: Parshuram (Bengali: পরশুরাম) is an upazila of Feni District in Chattogram Division in southeast Bangladesh.

topPlaces.name: Nidaya
topPlaces.description: Nidaya is a village in the state of Tripura, India. Seventy percent of the population work in agriculture, principally rice, in addition to potatoes, tomatoes, cabbage, and cauliflower.

topPlaces.name: Parshuram, Bangladesh
topPlaces.description: Parshuram (Bengali: পরশুরাম) is a town and municipality in Feni district in the division of Chittagong, Bangladesh. It is the administrative headquarter and urban centre of Parshuram Upazila.

topPlaces.name: Chittamara, Belonia
topPlaces.description: Chittamara is a village in South Tripura district in the Indian state of Tripura, located in the UTC 5.30 time zone and it follows Indian standard time (IST). Chittamara sun rise time varies -36 minutes from IST. The vehicle driving side in Chittamara is left, all vehicles should take left side during driving.

items.note: Belonia is a town and municipal council in South Tripura district, Tripura, India. It is also the headquarters of South Tripura District.
Rangamura is a village situated on the hills of Boromura range in Tripura, India. The populace consists of tribes like Kuki, Hrangkhawl, Koloi, Tripuri, Kaipeng and others.
Parshuram (Bengali: পরশুরাম) is an upazila of Feni District in Chattogram Division in southeast Bangladesh.
Nidaya is a village in the state of Tripura, India. Seventy percent of the population work in agriculture, principally rice, in addition to potatoes, tomatoes, cabbage, and cauliflower.
Parshuram (Bengali: পরশুরাম) is a town and municipality in Feni district in the division of Chittagong, Bangladesh. It is the administrative headquarter and urban centre of Parshuram Upazila.

Chittamara is a village in South Tripura district in the Indian state of Tripura, located in the UTC 5.30 time zone and it follows Indian standard time (IST). Chittamara sun rise time varies -36 minutes from IST. The vehicle driving side in Chittamara is left, all vehicles should take left side during driving.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajbari National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajbari National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajbari National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharaja Bir Bikram Airport, Agartala (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajbari National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajbari National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajbari National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Rajbari National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajbari National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Belonia, India, Rangamura, Parshuram Upazila, Nidaya, Parshuram, Bangladesh.
